---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2025-01-04"
---

```{r}
# Load required libraries
library(RMySQL)
library(readr)
library(readxl)

# Database credentials
db_user <- "root"
db_password <- "DB_PASSWORD"
db_name <- "impc_local_db"
db_host <- "localhost"

# File paths
filtered_data_file <- "~/Documents/filtered_aggregated_data.csv"
disease_info_file <- "~/Downloads/Disease_Information.xlsx"
parameter_desc_file <- "~/Downloads/IMPC_Parameter_Description.xlsx"
query_genes_file <- "~/Downloads/query_genes.csv"
procedure_file <- "~/Downloads/IMPC_procedure.xlsx"

# Connect to MySQL server
con <- dbConnect(MySQL(), user = db_user, password = db_password, host = db_host)

# Create the database and use it
dbSendQuery(con, paste0("CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS ", db_name))
dbSendQuery(con, paste0("USE ", db_name))

# Create and populate tables
dbSendQuery(con, "
  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS filtered_aggregated_data (
    analysis_id VARCHAR(255),
    gene_accession_id VARCHAR(255),
    gene_symbol VARCHAR(255),
    mouse_strain VARCHAR(255),
    mouse_life_stage VARCHAR(255),
    parameter_id VARCHAR(255),
    parameter_name VARCHAR(255),
    pvalue FLOAT
  )
")
filtered_data <- read.csv(filtered_data_file)
dbWriteTable(con, "filtered_aggregated_data", filtered_data, overwrite = TRUE, row.names = FALSE)

# Populate Disease_Information
disease_info <- read_excel(disease_info_file)
dbWriteTable(con, "Disease_Information", disease_info, overwrite = TRUE, row.names = FALSE)

# Populate IMPC_Parameter_Description
parameter_desc <- read_excel(parameter_desc_file)
dbWriteTable(con, "IMPC_Parameter_Description", parameter_desc, overwrite = TRUE, row.names = FALSE)

# Create and populate query_genes
dbSendQuery(con, "
  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS query_genes (
    gene_name VARCHAR(255)
  )
")
query_genes <- read.csv(query_genes_file)
dbWriteTable(con, "query_genes", query_genes, overwrite = TRUE, row.names = FALSE)

# Populate IMPC_procedure
procedure_data <- read_excel(procedure_file)
dbWriteTable(con, "IMPC_procedure", procedure_data, overwrite = TRUE, row.names = FALSE)

# Close the connection
dbDisconnect(con)

cat("Database created and populated successfully!")

```
